economic_notes: CFN Holdings LP and Cheam Enterprises Inc. are government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. CFN Holdings LP generated net income of $4,307,604 for year ended December 31, 2023. Subsequent to year-end, First Nation agreed to purchase two properties for combined consideration of $6,525,000. First Nation has provided guarantee of $11,980,000 on credit facility for Copper Raven Limited Partnership, a subsidiary of CFN Holdings LP.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain reliable estimates of Asset Retirement Obligations (PS 3280) for tangible capital assets with material AROs. Four entities consolidated: Pelolxw Historical Society, CFN Housing Society, Cheam First Nation Trust, 1465814 BC Ltd. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: CFN Holdings LP (99.99%) and Cheam Enterprises Inc. (100%). Earnings from GBEs of $4,309,612 is a significant revenue item. Segment schedule shows total government transfers of $8,951,842 (other government) plus ISC $3,165,289 = $12,117,131 total government transfers. OSR calculated as total revenue $18,481,615 minus total government transfers $12,117,131 = $6,364,484. No remuneration schedule included in the provided financial statement text. Deferred revenue increased significantly by $1,428,772 in the year. Post year-end property purchases of $6,525,000 noted.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
